title: Explicit Railway project binding diagnosis and creation
required_validation_commands: exact Railway project and environment binding validation
expected_results: governance repair performs no Railway operation
execution permits only the authorized explicit staging-environment create gate
at most one create attempt is allowed
existing staging environment is never recreated
no service, variable, domain, database, deployment, migration or source connection is changed
secrets never appear in output or evidence
only the allowlisted evidence target may change during execution
no successor gate or phase is activated automatically

railway_scope.transport: Railway GraphQL with explicit project ID
